potions.notes: Common. Adds random attack to hand. Inconsistent value
Common. Instant block, solid defensive option
Common. Random colorless card to hand. Too inconsistent
Common. Permanent +2 dexterity. Strong scaling for block-heavy decks
Common. +2 energy this turn. Enables big turns
Common. AoE damage to all enemies. Great for hallway fights
Common. Direct damage to one enemy. Simple and effective
Common. Temporary strength, lost at end of turn. Weak unless comboed
Common. Random power to hand. Can highroll strong powers
Common. Temporary dexterity. Good for surviving key turns
Common. Permanent +2 strength. Excellent scaling
Common. Draw 3 cards. Good for finding key cards
Common. Apply vulnerable to enemy. Amplifies damage output
Common. Apply weak to enemy. Defensive but low impact
Uncommon. Upgrade a random card in hand during combat
Uncommon. Remove debuffs from target player
Uncommon. Heal target player. Solid sustain option
Uncommon. Duplicate a card in hand. Incredibly strong with key cards
Uncommon. Gain block that persists between turns
Uncommon. Gain temp HP. Good buffer for tough fights
Uncommon. Discard hand and redraw. Very risky, rarely worth it
Uncommon. Gain metallicize (block each turn). Good for long fights
Uncommon. Gain thorns. Punishes multi-hit enemies
Uncommon. AoE debuff to all enemies. Good crowd control
Uncommon. Useful scaling buff for the combat
Uncommon. Regenerate HP over several turns. Good for boss fights
Uncommon. Artifact charges protect from debuffs
Uncommon. Add random cards, chaotic effect. Unreliable
Rare. Strong single-target damage or debuff to enemy
Rare. Strong buff to target player. Great for setup turns
Rare. Play random cards from draw pile. High variance but fun
Rare. Scry and draw. Excellent card selection
Rare. Fills all empty potion slots. Incredible value, usable any time
Rare. Auto-revive on death. Best defensive potion in the game
Rare. Permanent max HP increase. Always valuable, usable any time
Rare. Massive strength buff. Devastating with multi-hit attacks
Rare. Return a card from discard to hand. Good for key card recycling
Rare. Strong luck-based buff. High upside
Rare. Powerful gift effect. Strong in most situations
Rare. Remove all enemy buffs. Devastating vs scaling enemies
Rare. AoE constrain on all enemies. Powerful crowd control
Rare. Strong draw/setup potion. Excellent for key turns
Rare. Draw 5 cards and randomize costs. Huge draw with upside
Ironclad Common. Heal HP. Synergizes with self-damage playstyle
Ironclad Uncommon. Combat buff tied to Ironclad mechanics
Ironclad Rare. Powerful Ironclad-specific effect
Silent Common. Apply poison to enemy. Core for poison builds
Silent Uncommon. Adds shivs or similar to hand
Silent Rare. Intangible effect. Incredibly strong defensive option
Defect Common. Permanent focus. Core stat for orb builds
Defect Rare. Channel dark orbs. Strong scaling for orb decks
Defect Uncommon. Increase orb slots. Good for orb-heavy decks
Regent Common. Stellar-themed combat buff
Regent Uncommon. Authority/scaling buff for Regent
Regent Rare. Powerful cosmic effect for Regent
Necrobinder Common. Apply doom/death effect to enemy
Necrobinder Uncommon. Summon or soul-related effect
Necrobinder Rare. Summon undead minions. Strong board presence
Event. Harmful potion from events. Rarely desirable
Event. Combat-only event potion. Situationally useful
